steps.title: Convert seconds squared to minutes squared
steps.content: Since $1$ minute is $60$ seconds, $1\text{ min}^2=60^2=3{,}600\text{ s}^2$. Converting from per second squared to per minute squared multiplies by $3{,}600$.

steps.title: Convert meters to miles
steps.content: Use $1$ mile $=1{,}609$ meters, so divide by $1{,}609$ to convert meters to miles.

steps.title: Calculate and round
steps.content: $$1.1\cdot\frac{3{,}600}{1{,}609}\approx2.46.$$ Rounded to the nearest tenth, this is $2.5$ miles per minute squared.
